abhi-√dṛś (Inf. -draṣṭum) to look at:
Caus. -darśayati, to show;
to point out, denounce any one (acc.),  MBh. i, 7740  :
Pass. -dṛś-yate, to be visible, be in view, appear,  Mn. ix, 308 , &c.

results.rendered_html:
abhidṛś 1 P. To look at, behold.
— Caus.
1 To show, point out.
2 To show oneself to, appear before.
— pass.
1 To be seen, be visible, appear.
2 To be considered or thought.
